title: rubus candicans var. stenotrichus
intro: Rubus candicans var. stenotrichus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or White Raspberry, is a variant of the Rubus candicans plant, belonging to the Rosaceae family and native to the Himalayan regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus candicans var. stenotrichus include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever, coughs, and respiratory issues.
